fact: Three-tier storage: Tier 0 Active (0ms), Tier 1 Warm (~1s, SQLite), Tier 2 Cold (~3s, JSONL)
Value function: v(m) = alpha*recency + beta*importance + gamma*key_info_bonus
Compress don't discard principle (analogous to zswap)
Compression threshold adapts like Linux vm.swappiness
Approximates Belady MIN algorithm using semantic similarity
50-turn session: 100 msgs, 51K tokens, 13 key msgs, 50K window
100-turn session: 200 msgs, 105K tokens, 27 key msgs
